languages.original_text: "One is compelled to carry a certain stigma, living on Stygies VIII. Certain... theological disputes often lead to conflict with our fellow clergy. Black symbolises our guardedness and otherness, while with red we emphasise the purity of our faith in the Omnissiah and our fellowship with the rest of the Cult Mechanicus."

languages.text: "Жить на Стигии VIII — значит принимать на себя определенную стигму. Определенные... теологические разногласия зачастую приводят к конфликтам с нашими собратьями. Черный цвет символизирует нашу осторожность и инаковость, а красным мы подчеркиваем чистоту веры в {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссию{/g} и общность с остальным Культом Механикус".

traits.locale_text: "Жить на Стигии VIII — значит принимать на себя определенную стигму. Определенные... теологические разногласия зачастую приводят к конфликтам с нашими собратьями. "One is compelled to carry a certain stigma, living on Stygies VIII. Certain... theological disputes often lead to conflict with our fellow clergy. Black symbolises our guardedness and otherness, while with red we emphasise the purity of our faith in the Omnissiah and our fellowship with the rest of the Cult Mechanicus."

languages.text: «Es inevitable acarrear cierto estigma al vivir en Stygies VIII. Ciertas... disputas tecnológicas generaban conflictos frecuentes con otros miembros del clero. El negro simboliza nuestro aislamiento y nuestra singularidad, mientras que con el rojo enfatizamos la pureza de nuestra fe en el {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} y nustra hermandad con el resto del Culto Mechanicus».
languages.original_text: "One is compelled to carry a certain stigma, living on Stygies VIII. Certain... theological disputes often lead to conflict with our fellow clergy. Black symbolises our guardedness and otherness, while with red we emphasise the purity of our faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} and our fellowship with the rest of the Cult Mechanicus."

traits.locale_text: «Es inevitable acarrear cierto estigma al vivir en Stygies VIII. Ciertas... disputas tecnológicas generaban conflictos frecuentes con otros miembros del clero. El negro simboliza nuestro aislamiento y nuestra singularidad, mientras que con el rojo enfatizamos la pureza de nuestra fe en el {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} y nustra hermandad con el resto del Culto Mechanicus».

languages.text: “生活在斯泰吉斯8号上，总会背负某种污名。一些……神学争议，常常让我们与其他教士发生冲突。黑色象征着我们的谨慎与异质性，而红色则强调我们对{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}信仰的纯洁性，以及我们与机械修会其余部分的联系。”
languages.original_text: "One is compelled to carry a certain stigma, living on Stygies VIII. Certain... theological disputes often lead to conflict with our fellow clergy. Black symbolises our guardedness and otherness, while with red we emphasise the purity of our faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} and our fellowship with the rest of the Cult Mechanicus."

traits.locale_text: “生活在斯泰吉斯8号上，总会背负某种污名。一些……神学争议，常常让我们与其他教士发生冲突。黑色象征着我们的谨慎与异质性，而红色则强调我们对{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}信仰的纯洁性，以及我们与机械修会其余部分的联系。”

languages.text: « La vie sur Stygies VIII vous pousse à conserver quelques stigmates. Certains... débats théologiques ont tendance à entraîner un conflit avec les autres membres du clergé. Le noir symbolise notre réserve et notre différence, tandis qu'avec le rouge, nous mettons l'accent sur la pureté de notre foi en {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}l'Omnimessie{/g} et notre appartenance au Culte Mechanicus. »
languages.original_text: "One is compelled to carry a certain stigma, living on Stygies VIII. Certain... theological disputes often lead to conflict with our fellow clergy. Black symbolises our guardedness and otherness, while with red we emphasise the purity of our faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} and our fellowship with the rest of the Cult Mechanicus."

traits.locale_text: « La vie sur Stygies VIII vous pousse à conserver quelques stigmates. Certains... débats théologiques ont tendance à entraîner un conflit avec les autres membres du clergé. Le noir symbolise notre réserve et notre différence, tandis qu'avec le rouge, nous mettons l'accent sur la pureté de notre foi en {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}l'Omnimessie{/g} et notre appartenance au Culte Mechanicus. »

languages.text: "Das Leben auf Stygies VIII ist mit einem gewissen Stigma verbunden. Bestimmte ... theologische Dispute führen häufig zu Konflikten mit anderen Geistlichen. Während Schwarz unsere Vorsichtigkeit und Andersartigkeit symbolisiert, bringen wir mit der Farbe Rot die Reinheit unseres Glaubens an den {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} und unsere Verbundenheit mit dem Kult Mechanicus zum Ausdruck."
languages.original_text: "One is compelled to carry a certain stigma, living on Stygies VIII. Certain... theological disputes often lead to conflict with our fellow clergy. Black symbolises our guardedness and otherness, while with red we emphasise the purity of our faith in the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} and our fellowship with the rest of the Cult Mechanicus."

traits.locale_text: "Das Leben auf Stygies VIII ist mit einem gewissen Stigma verbunden. Bestimmte ... theologische Dispute führen häufig zu Konflikten mit anderen Geistlichen. Während Schwarz unsere Vorsichtigkeit und Andersartigkeit symbolisiert, bringen wir mit der Farbe Rot die Reinheit unseres Glaubens an den {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} und unsere Verbundenheit mit dem Kult Mechanicus zum Ausdruck."

languages.text: "スティージス8世で生活していると、ある種の汚名を背負わざるを得ない。ある種の...神学的な論争は、しばしば仲間の聖職者たちとの対立につながる。黒は私たちの警戒心と他者性を象徴し、赤は私たちのオムニサイアへの信仰の純粋さとカルト・メカニクスの他の人々との交わりを強調する。"
languages.original_text: "One is compelled to carry a certain stigma, living on Stygies VIII. Certain... theological disputes often lead to conflict with our fellow clergy. Black symbolises our guardedness and otherness, while with red we emphasise the purity of our faith in the Omnissiah and our fellowship with the rest of the Cult Mechanicus."

languages.text: "Stygies VIII'de yaşarken belirli bir damgayı taşımak zorundayız. Belirli... Teolojik tartışmalar, genellikle rahip kardeşlerimizle çatışmaya yol açar. Siyah, korumacılığımızı ve ötekiliğimizi simgeler. Kırmızıyla ise {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih'e{/g} olan inancımızın saflığını ve Cult Mechanicus'un kalanıyla olan dostluğumuzu vurgularız."
languages.original_text: "One is compelled to carry a certain stigma, living on Stygies VIII. Certain... theological disputes often lead to conflict with our fellow clergy.
